title: Shocked Beauty And The Beast GIF by Disney On Broadway
Wildlife gif. A white owl turns his head to look straight at us and has an expression of pure shock. Its eyes are wide and its mouth is open as if gasping.
Parks and Recreation gif. Chris Pratt as Andy lights up in excited surprise as he reacts to shocking news with his mouth agape.
SNL gif. Chris Farley in the Schmitts Gay Beer sketch lifts the sunglass portion of his double lenses in stunned surprise.
Celebrity gif. Alison Brie blinks and shakes her head before narrowing her eyes and opening her mouth in an expression of shock and confusion.
Friends gif. Matt LeBlanc as Joey looks shocked to right of frame, then looks slightly less shocked as he turns to us.
Video gif. A young girl wearing glasses and a head scarf puts her hand to her chest and leans back, her face an expression of extreme offense.
Video gif. Close up of a black dog with a slight underbite staring into the distance with a frightened expression. His snout senses that something's in the air.
Movie gif. Samuel L Jackson as John Shaft in the movie Shaft looks taken aback, stunned into silence.
Movie gif. Jim Carrey as Fletcher Reede from Liar Liar clutches his face as he leans away in playful horror.

Friends gif. Matt LeBlanc as Joey seated in a chair, smiling softly as his eyes grow wide. His smile fades into a stern then surprised face as his mouth drops open, clearly shocked by what he's looking at off screen.
Shocked Snl GIF by Saturday Night Live
TV gif. Hassan Johnson as Wee-Bey on The Wire has his mouth open in shock. He rubs his chin and then crosses his arms. He then turns to look over his shoulder.
Sports gif. Terrence Ross' eyes dart around as his facial expression seems to say "yikes!"
Video gif. We zoom in on a woman wearing pearls who turns toward us with bulging eyes and a stunned expression on her face.
Video gif. A man uses his hands to imitate his mind being blown and fireworks and explosions are overlaid in front of him.
Celebrity gif. Tiffany Pollard sits up straight and leans back, widening her eyes and pressing her hand to her chest, in shock.
Movie gif. A skeleton in Coco wears a police uniform as it leans on a counter and reacts with surprise. Its eyes bug out and its jaw falls off, landing with a bounce on the counter.
Video gif. A gray and white cat looks around with wide eyes and jaw dropped in shock.
TV gif. Laci Mosley as Harper on iCarly has her hand on her chest and looks at us in shock.
Reality TV gif. Close-up of Liam Charles from the Great British Bake Off cupping his hands over his mouth and looking straight ahead with an awestruck expression.
Will Ferrell Wow GIF by slicedbread
Video gif. A man gazes ahead with shocked raised eyebrows. His unmoving face contradicts with his nonstop blinking eyes.
The Office gif. Zoom in on Oscar Nunez as Oscar Martinez. He has a shocked, almost worried expression on his face. He covers his mouth with his face.
Shocked Season 4 GIF by The Office
TV gif. Tituss Burgess as host of the Late Late Show holds his hands up in surrender and leans back in a guest chair as he shakes his head with a look of shock on his face.
Shocked Five Nights At Freddys GIF
Cartoon gif. From the Futurama episode "The Lesser of Two Evils", an upset Fry tries to make sense of a plot twist. "I'm shocked. Shocked!" Suddenly, he's not upset anymore. "Well, not that shocked."
TV gif. Wearing a grayish-blue head wrap and large hoop earrings, Alicia Keys from The Voice gives us a stunned, smiling, slack-jawed blink.
Celebrity gif. Desus Nice in a Yankees baseball cap falls back in a leather chair with amusement and surprise like he just figured out a clever joke.
Shocked Five Nights At Freddys GIF
Video gif. A woman in a bright yellow skirt suit clutches her chest and falls to the ground dramatically. Girl, you good?
Matt Leblanc Wow GIF by NowThis
SNL gif. Comedian Kenan Thompson dressed as Steve Harvey makes the TV host's signature shocked facial expression.
Shocked Sesame Street GIF by Muppet Wiki
TV gif. Jimmy Fallon delivering a monologue on his talk show "The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon." Looking disappointed, he puts his hand on his chest and says "Personally, I'm shocked!"
Video gif. Wide-eyed, a shocked kitten brings its paw to its mouth as if to say, “uh oh.”
TV gif. Eddie Steeples, as Darnell Turner from My Name is Earl, looks horrified at lower right of frame.

shocked in awe GIF by bartek ujma
Celebrity gif. Oprah Winfrey holds her hands to the sides of her head, and her mouth is open as she seems stunned, her eyes looking about in disbelief.
Video gif. A woman stands with her hands on her chest and her face quickly transforms into a nervous smile to her gasping widely and her eyes almost popping out her head from shock.
Video gif. Tabby kitten’s eyes are wide with shock and it covers its open mouth with its small white paw. Text, “Oh Snap.”
